title: SellWorth
description: A full on replica of DonutSMP sell function. Old & New menu-style is supported. Packet-based worth lore, 1000+ item prices configured, toggleworth, sell multipliers, sell axe, sell history, worth menu, and much more.
body:
# A complete replica of DonutSMP Sell plugin

## Features
- Worth lore | Packed-based worth lore that doesn't interfere with anything.
- Sell History | See what you have sold
- Sell Multipliers | Multiply the amount of profit by selling more items
- Worth menu | View the prices of items available to be sold
- Sell Axe | Built in sell axe to sell items in chest
- Filtering options | Go through items more easily by filtering their category

## Dependencies
- **Java 21** or newer
- ProtocolLibs
- Vault
- An Economy plugin

![Image Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c190d9cf0b4439b3babc7d9574d45c5d261c9c9_0.webp)
